settings.heading: Professional embroidered polos, hats, jackets and uniforms.
settings.lead: Give your business, school or team a clean professional finish with custom embroidery from L F Graphco LLC.
settings.body:
Embroidery is the right choice for polos, hats, jackets, bags, uniforms and long-term corporate apparel. It gives logos a dimensional stitched finish that looks polished in the office, on job sites and at events.

L F Graphco can help with logo placement, thread color planning, garment selection and quote-ready order details.
